name_en: Top-tier replica M47161 Navy Blue This Diane bag is made of classic Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, with the brand logo woven into a removable wide jacquard shoulder strap, adding a crossbody option to the detachable leather shoulder strap for a flexible fit for elegant or dynamic styles. Dimensions: 23 x 16 x 8.5 cm
